A.evidence: Clean prose and equations through section 4.1, but figure captions/images and all visible tables are omitted.

B.evidence: Very faithful text/math and captions; Fig. 3 is linearized reasonably, but visible Tables 1-8 are not captured as tables.

C.evidence: Good prose with captions, but figure content/table content missing, heading levels drift, and equations drop bold y in (1)/(2).

D.evidence: Text is mostly present but title/author order is badly jumbled with duplicated/misread names; math is plain OCR and tables are absent.

E.evidence: Prose is usable but author order is broken, equations (1)/(2) are replaced by formula-not-decoded, and tables are absent.

F.evidence: Strong prose and LaTeX math, but references/anchors pollute text, footnote markup is corrupted, and no visible tables are captured.

G.evidence: Early prose/math are acceptable, but arXiv stamp/footnote are misplaced and Fig. 3 becomes a massive repeated garbled 'pool size' sequence.

H.evidence: Readable prose but math is degraded to spaced OCR without equation numbers, figure/table content is missing, and hierarchy is flat.
